# Live Product Tour: Iterable SMS

Webinar

# Live Product Tour: Iterable SMS

July 10, 2025

18 minutes

On demand

## Description

**See how Iterable powers real-time, personalized native SMS at scale.**

Watch our Live Product Tour and dive into how brands use Iterable to send timely, personalized SMS messages for their marketing and transactional use cases, that drive real results—without the complexity of old-school campaigns. You’ll learn how to:

*   Easily personalize SMS messages with user profile data, events, and other attributes to create a truly dynamic experience
*   Seamlessly integrate SMS with other channels like email and push notifications within a single journey
*   Use delivery options like quiet hours, frequency capping, and robust exit rules to be conscientious of your users’ preferences
